items.title_en: Trump postpones AI executive order signing: 'I didn't like certain aspects'
items.title_zh: 特朗普推迟签署人工智能行政命令：“我不喜欢某些方面”
items.desc_en: Trump said that AI is "causing tremendous good," and he was concerned that the executive order "could have been a blocker."
items.desc_zh: 特朗普表示人工智能正在“带来巨大的好处”，他担心该行政命令“可能会成为阻碍”。

items.title_en: Trump administration says new EPA rules will save you money at the supermarket. It's not clear they will
items.title_zh: 特朗普政府表示，美国环保局的新规定将为你在超市省钱。目前尚不清楚他们会
items.desc_en: Trump delayed Biden-era EPA refrigerant rules, saying the move will lower grocery costs, though the impact on food prices remains unclear.
items.desc_zh: 特朗普推迟了拜登时代的美国环保署制冷剂规定，称此举将降低食品杂货成本，但对食品价格的影响尚不清楚。

items.title_en: Charges dismissed against official at school where 6-year-old shot teacher
items.title_zh: 六岁儿童枪杀老师的学校官员的指控被驳回
items.desc_en: The child fired a single shot at a teacher, who had to have surgery after the incident in 2023.
items.desc_zh: 这名孩子向一名老师开了一枪，这名老师在 2023 年事件发生后不得不接受手术。

items.title_en: Private credit defaults hit record high as interest rates soar
items.title_zh: 随着利率飙升，私人信贷违约创历史新高
items.desc_en: Funds are scrambling to restructure, and they're marking down asset values.
items.desc_zh: 基金纷纷进行重组，并降低资产价值。

items.title_en: Stocks making the biggest moves midday: Rigetti Computing, Deere, Bloom Energy, Spotify & more
items.title_zh: 中午涨幅最大的股票：Rigetti Computer、Deere、Bloom Energy、Spotify 等
items.desc_en: These are the stocks posting the largest moves in midday trading.
items.desc_zh: 这些是午盘交易中涨幅最大的股票。

items.title_en: AG Blanche meets with GOP senators on Trump's DOJ  fund; Tillis calls it 'stupid'
items.title_zh: AG 布兰奇会见共和党参议员，讨论特朗普的司法部基金；蒂利斯称其“愚蠢”
items.desc_en: Critics of the "Anti-Weaponization Fund" fear it will give money to Trump supporters who attacked police defending the U.S. Capitol on Jan. 6, 2021.
items.desc_zh: “反武器化基金”的批评者担心，它将向2021年1月6日袭击保卫美国国会大厦的警察的特朗普支持者提供资金。

items.title_en: Trump ballroom, 'slush fund' are flashpoints as Senate takes up DHS funding bill
items.title_zh: 参议院讨论国土安全部拨款法案后，特朗普舞厅和“行贿基金”成为热点
items.desc_en: Democrats seek to score political points as internal GOP tensions simmer over President Donald Trump's ballroom and ''weaponization fund'
items.desc_zh: 随着共和党内部围绕唐纳德·特朗普总统的舞厅和“武器化基金”的紧张局势不断升温，民主党人寻求获得政治分数

items.title_en: Walmart warns US shoppers are cutting spending as higher petrol prices bite
items.title_zh: 沃尔玛警告美国消费者因汽油价格上涨而削减支出
items.desc_en: The retail giant said it expects customers to cut back in the coming months due to higher pump prices.
items.desc_zh: 这家零售巨头表示，由于汽油价格上涨，预计客户在未来几个月内将减少开支。

items.title_en: DNC releases 2024 election autopsy, party chair slams it

items.desc_en: A disclaimer sits at the top of each page saying: "This document reflects the views of the author, not the DNC."
items.desc_zh: 每页顶部都有一条免责声明：“本文件反映了作者的观点，而不是民主党全国委员会的观点。”

items.title_en: Stellantis targets 35% North American sales increase, led by Ram Trucks and Chrysler revival
items.title_zh: Stellantis 的目标是在 Ram Trucks 和克莱斯勒复兴的带动下，北美销量增长 35%
items.desc_en: Stellantis said at an investor day Thursday that it plans to increase its North American sales by 35% by 2030.
items.desc_zh: Stellantis 在周四的投资者日表示，计划到 2030 年将北美销售额增加 35%。

items.title_en: LIV Golf seeks to raise up to $350 million from investors as post-PIF reality sets in
items.title_zh: 随着后 PIF 现实的到来，LIV Golf 寻求从投资者那里筹集至多 3.5 亿美元
items.desc_en: LIV Golf is preparing to take its updated business plan and investor pitch on the road as soon as Thursday, in an effort to raise fresh capital.
items.desc_zh: LIV Golf 正准备最早于周四推出更新后的商业计划和投资者推介，以筹集新资金。

items.title_en: Spotify stock pops on guidance at first investor day since 2022
items.title_zh: Spotify 股票在 2022 年以来的第一个投资者日上涨
items.desc_en: Spotify, which is holding its first investor day in four years, is now under the direction of co-CEOs Gustav Söderström and Alex Norström.
items.desc_zh: Spotify 举办了四年来的首个投资者日，目前由联合首席执行官古斯塔夫·索德斯特罗姆 (Gustav Söderström) 和亚历克斯·诺斯特罗姆 (Alex Norström) 领导。

items.title_en: Iran steps up claim to control Strait of Hormuz
items.title_zh: 伊朗加强声称控制霍尔木兹海峡
items.desc_en: Iran publishes a map claiming "armed forces oversight" across more than 22,000 sq km of the waterway.
items.desc_zh: 伊朗发布了一张地图，声称“武装部队监督”了超过22,000平方公里的水道。

items.title_en: Gaza flotilla activists set for deportation from Israel as backlash over treatment grows
items.title_zh: 由于对治疗的强烈反对，加沙船队活动人士准备被以色列驱逐出境
items.desc_en: Activists have begun to leave Israel after international outrage over their treatment in detention.
items.desc_zh: 在国际社会对其拘留待遇感到愤怒后，活动人士已开始离开以色列。

items.title_en: Trump says he will speak to Taiwan's president in break from protocol
items.title_zh: 特朗普称他将违反礼节与台湾总统通话
items.desc_en: It comes as the US weighs whether to proceed with a $14bn arms sales to Taiwan, which China claims as its own.
items.desc_zh: 在此之际，美国正在考虑是否继续向中国宣称拥有主权的台湾出售价值 140 亿美元的武器。

items.title_zh: 伊朗最高领导人表示铀必须留在国内后油价上涨逾2%

items.desc_zh: 伊朗对其浓缩铀的立场可能会使与美国的和谈复杂化。

items.title_zh: 法航和空客因2009年飞机失事被判过失杀人罪
items.desc_en: The companies were found guilty by a French court over an air disaster which killed 228 people.
items.desc_zh: 法国一家法院因造成 228 人死亡的空难而判定这两家公司有罪。

items.title_zh: 欧洲淋病和梅毒创历史新高

items.title_en: Dozens of vehicles burnt as Mali jihadists enforce blockade
items.title_zh: 马里圣战分子实施封锁，数十辆汽车被烧毁
items.desc_en: Mali is a landlocked country and depends heavily on fuel transported from neighbouring countries.
items.desc_zh: 马里是一个内陆国家，严重依赖从邻国运输的燃料。

items.title_en: Cavs owner Dan Gilbert turns grief over son’s rare disease into search for a cure
items.title_zh: 骑士队老板丹·吉尔伯特将儿子罕见疾病的悲痛转为寻找治疗方法
items.desc_en: Dan Gilbert honors his son Nick by funding research into neurofibromatosis, the rare disease that took Nick’s life.
items.desc_zh: 丹·吉尔伯特通过资助神经纤维瘤病（一种夺走尼克生命的罕见疾病）的研究来纪念他的儿子尼克。

items.desc_zh: 此前，美国指控古巴前领导人谋杀，这是向古巴政权施加压力的最新举措。

items.desc_en: The chip giant reported more stellar results but its shares fell after-hours as investors wonder if it can keep up its pace of growth amid greater competition.

items.title_zh: 刚果民主共和国因埃博拉疫情取消世界杯训练营

items.desc_zh: 此次疫情由一种罕见的埃博拉病毒引起，据信迄今为止已造成 139 人死亡。

items.title_en: Zoe Kleinman: Why the AI industry is the real winner of the Musk-Altman trial
items.title_zh: Zoe Kleinman：为什么人工智能行业是马斯克-奥特曼试验的真正赢家
items.desc_en: The trial in Oakland, California has helped lift the veil on the AI sector - and the huge egos of the men at the heart of it.
items.desc_zh: 加利福尼亚州奥克兰的试验揭开了人工智能领域的面纱，以及该领域核心人物的巨大自负。

items.title_en: Robo-top: The machines that could make your next t-shirt
items.title_zh: Robo-top：可以为你制作下一件 T 恤的机器

items.desc_zh: 大多数衣服都是在亚洲制造的，但新机器可以将部分工作带回西方。

items.title_en: Satellites and AI used to track UK hedgehogs in bid to slow decline
items.title_zh: 卫星和人工智能用于追踪英国刺猬以减缓其数量下降
items.desc_en: Researchers hope the project will also help to identify barriers preventing hedgehogs from finding food and mates in the wild.
items.desc_zh: 研究人员希望该项目还能帮助找出刺猬在野外寻找食物和交配的障碍。

items.title_en: Elon Musk just lost another lawsuit. Will he keep fighting?
items.title_zh: 埃隆·马斯克刚刚又输掉了另一场官司。他会继续战斗吗？
items.desc_en: Musk's loss against OpenAI is the latest in a string of courtroom defeats.
items.desc_zh: 马斯克输给 OpenAI 是一系列法庭失败中的最新一起。

items.title_en: Jury tosses Elon Musk's lawsuit against OpenAI and its boss Sam Altman
items.title_zh: 陪审团驳回埃隆·马斯克对 OpenAI 及其老板萨姆·奥尔特曼的诉讼
items.desc_en: Jurors spent nearly a month hearing and viewing evidence in the high-profile trial, where Musk had accused Altman of "stealing a charity".
items.desc_zh: 陪审员们花了近一个月的时间在这场备受瞩目的审判中听取和查看证据，马斯克在审判中指控奥特曼“窃取慈善机构”。

items.desc_zh: 帕迪·罗杰斯表示，天文台丰富的历史表明了人类知识的力量以及避免“依赖”人工智能的必要性。
